title: Oligactis mikanioides
taxonomy: Oligactis mikanioides belongs to the family Commelinaceae. This plant is classified as a species within the genus Oligactis. The Commelinaceae family is a group of plants commonly known as spiderworts, which are native to tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Oligactis mikanioides is further divided into various taxonomic ranks, including kingdom, order, and class. It is classified under the kingdom Plantae, order Commelinales, and class Liliopsida.
